description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Temporary Service Adjustment of Park Island Ferry Services
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 珀麗灣客運渡輪服務臨時調整

2026-06-21T20:00:00.CONTENT_EN: The following ferry services are temporarily adjusted on 22 June 2026: Park Island Transport Company Limited 'Ma Wan - Central' Route: - Ma Wan to Central: Sailings departing at 5:00 p.m. and 7:30 p.m. are replaced by bus services (Route NR338S) - Central to Ma Wan: Sailings departing at 5:30 p.m. and 8:00 p.m. are replaced by bus services (Route NR338S) 'Ma Wan - Tsuen Wan' Route: - Ma Wan to Tsuen Wan: Sailing at 8:10 a.m. is cancelled - Tsuen Wan to Ma Wan: Sailing at 8:30 a.m. is cancelled
2026-06-21T20:00:00.CONTENT_CN: 以下渡輪服務於2026年6⽉22⽇作出臨時調整： 珀麗灣客運有限公司 「⾺灣-中環」航線： -⾺灣⾄中環：下午5時及下午7時30分開出的班次由巴⼠服務(路線NR338S)代替營運 -中環⾄⾺灣：下午5時30分及下午8時開出的班次由巴⼠服務(路線NR338S)代替營運 「⾺灣-荃灣」航線： -⾺灣⾄荃灣：取消上午8時10分開出的班次 -荃灣⾄⾺灣：取消上午8時30分開出的班次

Park Island Transport Company Limited
'Ma Wan - Central' Route:

- Central to Ma Wan: Sailings departing at 5:30 p.m. and 8:00 p.m. are replaced by bus services (Route NR338S)

-⾺灣⾄中環：下午5時及下午7時30分開出的班次由巴⼠服務(路線NR338S)代替營運
-中環⾄⾺灣：下午5時30分及下午8時開出的班次由巴⼠服務(路線NR338S)代替營運

Park Island Transport Company Limited

- Central to Ma Wan: Sailings departing at 5:30 p.m. and 8:00 p.m. are replaced by bus services (Route NR338S)

- Tsuen Wan to Ma Wan: Sailing at 8:30 a.m. is cancelled.

2026-07-20T07:10:00.CONTENT_EN: Amber Rainstorm Warning Signal is in force. Due to wet weather and slippery roads, Transport Department appeals motorists and the commuters to: i. plan the journey in advance; ii. allow more traveling time; iii. drive with extra care and patience; and iv. take heed of traffic situation particularly at busy junctions with obstructive views.
2026-07-20T07:10:00.CONTENT_CN: 黃色暴雨警告信號現已生效，天雨路滑，運輸署呼籲駕駛人士及乘客須: i.提早計劃行程路線； ii.預留充裕時間出門； iii.小心駕駛及保持忍讓；及 iv.留意交通情況，特别在視線受阻的繁忙路口。

2026-07-20T08:05:00.CONTENT_EN: Red Rainstorm Warning Signal is in force. Due to wet weather and slippery roads, Transport Department appeals motorists and the commuters to: i. plan the journey in advance; ii. allow more traveling time; iii. drive with extra care and patience; and iv. take heed of traffic situation particularly at busy junctions with obstructive views.
2026-07-20T08:05:00.CONTENT_CN: 紅色暴雨警告信號現已生效，天雨路滑，運輸署呼籲駕駛人士及乘客須: i.提早計劃行程路線； ii.預留充裕時間出門； iii.小心駕駛及保持忍讓；及 iv.留意交通情況，特别在視線受阻的繁忙路口。

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: High Speed Rail (Hong Kong Section) adds temporary train trips
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 高速鐵路(香港段)加開臨時列車服務

2026-07-20T15:26:00.CONTENT_EN:
In response to the demand, the High Speed Rail (Hong Kong Section) will add the following temporary train trips:

From Hong Kong West Kowloon Station to Futian Station
● 25, 26 July; 1, 2, 8, 9, 15, 16, 22, 23 August: G5834, G5836, G5838, G5840, G5842, G5844, G5846, G5848, G5850, G5852, G5854, G5856, G5868
● 7, 21 August: G5866

From Hong Kong West Kowloon Station to Shenzhenbei Station
● 7, 21 August: G5680

From Futian Station to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station
● 25, 26 July; 1, 2, 8, 9, 15, 16, 22, 23 August: G5833, G5835, G5837, G5839, G5841, G5843, G5845, G5847, G5849, G5851, G5853, G5855, G5867
● 7, 21 August: G5865

From Shenzhenbei Station to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station
● 7, 21 August: G5679

Tickets are available for purchase through the 12306 official website (12306.cn) or mobile app; appointed travel agents; or at Hong Kong West Kowloon Station.
For train schedules, please refer to the 12306 official website (12306.cn) or mobile app, or the High Speed Rail website or mobile app.
2026-07-20T15:26:00.CONTENT_CN:
配合客運需求，高速鐵路(香港段)將加開以下臨時列車車次：

由香港西九龍站前往福田站
●7月25, 26日; 8月1, 2, 8, 9, 15, 16, 22, 23日: G5834, G5836, G5838, G5840, G5842, G5844, G5846, G5848, G5850, G5852, G5854, G5856, G5868
●8月7, 21日: G5866

由香港西九龍站前往深圳北站
●8月7, 21日: G5680

由福田站前往香港西九龍站
●7月25, 26日; 8月1, 2, 8, 9, 15, 16, 22, 23日: G5833, G5835, G5837, G5839, G5841, G5843, G5845, G5847, G5849, G5851, G5853, G5855, G5867
●8月7, 21日: G5865

由深圳北站前往香港西九龍站
●8月7, 21日: G5679

乘客可透過12306官方網站(12306.cn)或手機應用程式、指定代理或前往香港西九龍站購買列車車票。
有關列車服務詳情，請瀏覽12306官方網站(12306.cn)或手機應用程式、高速鐵路網頁及手機應用程式。
